oneOf.description: If true, uses default flammable values. If false, disables flammable properties.

oneOf.title: Flammable
oneOf.description: Describes the flammable properties for this block.

catch_chance_modifier.description: A modifier affecting the chance that this block will catch flame when next to a fire. Higher number means more likely to catch on fire.

destroy_chance_modifier.description: A modifier affecting the chance that this block will be destroyed by flames when on fire. Higher number means more likely to be destroyed by fire.
